Table of Contents

Interface ITableCrawler3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a crawler capable of traversing tables.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("557A0CE7-5525-4EBF-87E4-CEA03954BBAE")]
public interface ITableCrawler3 : ITableCrawler2, ITableCrawler
